title: Power Integrations Earnings Preview
text: Benzinga reported on Power Integrations' quarterly earnings announcement scheduled for February 6, 2023. Analysts anticipated the company would report earnings per share of $0.46. The article highlighted that investors should focus on forward guidance rather than simply whether the company beats or misses earnings estimates. Forward guidance often has more impact on stock price than earnings beats or misses. Previous Performance: In the prior quarter, Power Integrations exceeded EPS expectations by $0.01 but saw shares decline 6.43% the following day, illustrating that positive surprises don't guarantee stock appreciation. Trading Context: As of February 2, shares traded at $90.68, up 9.12% over the preceding 52 weeks. This positive long-term performance suggested shareholders entered the earnings release with optimistic sentiment. The article included a performance table showing earnings estimates versus actual results across multiple quarters, demonstrating the company's track record of beating analyst projections while experiencing mixed stock price reactions.
